title: Chapter 177
content:

My bet was on the latter part, because potential was not just something that could increase just like that. While I did find it ridiculous that fucking a woman in her ass could increase her potential, I knew it wouldn’t be as simple as that.

If it were, I would have just banged my head against the wall again and again due to how ridiculous and broken the ability was.

Anyway, everything has limits, and so did this ability.

The question was, where did these limits end?

The perfect target to find out was…

Despite her saying that, the atmosphere was a little romantic. As if she were waiting for me.

The room was dimly lit by mana stones, casting a warm, golden glow over the luxurious furniture and the large bed. There was also a faint scent of some sort of incense.

Her long, lustrous black hair cascaded down her back in silky waves, framing her elegant face.

“Should I come back later?” I asked.

“No. I was just spending some time with myself. Come in.” Zara replied.
